data.name: AgriInsurance Risk Agent
data.description: Assesses agricultural insurance risk by analyzing historical loss data, weather patterns, and crop vulnerability to recommend coverage levels and pricing that balance farmer protection with portfolio profitability.
data.readme:
## AgriInsurance Risk Agent

Assesses agricultural insurance risk by analyzing historical loss data, weather patterns, and crop vulnerability to recommend coverage levels and pricing that balance farmer protection with portfolio profitability.

### Framework: CrewAI

### Tools
["Loss Analyzer","Weather Risk Model","Vulnerability Assessor"]

### Tags
["insurance","risk","weather","crop-protection"]
data.author: AgricultureAI Labs
